title: Epic Knights: Addon
description: Adds additional medieval stuff to the Epic Knights mod
body:
The addon allows you to dive deeper into the atmosphere of the Middle Ages, as it adds a ton of new armor, weapons and decorations from all over Europe XIII - XVI centuries to the original mod.

**Fully gilding template is rarely sold by armorer villager**  
This project requires [Epic Knights](https://www.modrinth.com/mod/epic-knights-shields-armor-and-weapons) mod with all its dependencies to be installed. The most of the textures and models are created by fans. Special thanks to SuperSus890 and SteveMc for their biggest contribution.
